results.title: Citation Machine®: APA Format & APA Citation Generator
excerpts: Included on this reference list page is the full information for any in-text citations found in the body of the project. These references are listed in alphabetical order by the author's last name.

results.title: Free APA Citation Generator | With Chrome Extension - Scribbr
excerpts: Scribbr’s free citation generator automatically generates accurate references and in-text citations. This citation guide outlines the most important citation guidelines from the 7th edition APA Publication Manual (2020).

results.title: APA Formatting and Style Guide (7th Edition) - Purdue OWL®
excerpts: Rules for handling works by a single author or multiple authors that apply to all APA-style references in your reference list, regardless of the type of work (book, article, electronic resource, etc.)

results.title: American Psychologist - Issue Library
excerpts: Welcome to the American Psychologist digital edition! American Psychologist is the scholarly peer-reviewed flagship journal of the American Psychological Association.

results.title: American Psychologist
excerpts: As such, American Psychologist publishes current and timely high-impact papers of broad interest. These papers include empirical reports, meta-analyses, and other types of scholarly reviews.

results.title: Clerk Receives Prestigious Florida Certified Professional Clerk Certification - Madeira Beach, FL
excerpts:
Huge congratulations to our City Clerk, Clara VanBlargan, on achieving the prestigious Florida Certified Professional Clerk (FCPC) certification!

results.title: Free APA Citation Generator [Updated for 2026] - MyBib
excerpts: Our APA generator was built with a focus on simplicity and speed. To generate a formatted reference list or bibliography just follow these steps: Start by searching for the source you want to cite in the search box at the top of the page. MyBib will automatically locate all the required information. If any is missing you can add it yourself.
